expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: cross-section interaction audit catches template x pause-mode and prompt-editor-open states
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly includes a section “Case focus to be explicitly covered” listing “template × pause-mode” and “prompt-editor-open states”, and then provides retrospective evidence for both: “1) Template × Pause Mode interaction was missed” (BCIN-7730) and “2) Prompt-editor-open state interaction was missed” (BCIN-7708/7709).

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: result.md is titled “# Phase 5a Checkpoint Enforcement Audit” and states “Primary phase under test: Phase 5a”, grounding requirements in the “Phase 5a Review Rubric” and focusing on Phase 5a artifacts/sections (e.g., required “## Cross-Section Interaction Audit” and accept/return gating).
